name: infa-customer-identification-mcp-server
title: Informatica Customer Identification MCP Server
summary: Informatica (A Salesforce company) Provides an MCP server that Searches and retrieves consolidated, high-confidence master records from Customer360 by Informatica Master Data Management (MDM)
description: Informatica (A Salesforce company) Provides an MCP server that Searches and retrieves consolidated, high-confidence master records from Customer360 by Informatica Master Data Management (MDM)

useCases.name: Customer 360 Inquiries
useCases.description: Agents can provide a complete, unified view of a customer's profile by fetching the consolidated Master Record.

useCases.name: Data Deduplication
useCases.description: Identifies whether a new lead already exists in MDM SaaS to prevent duplicate record creation.

useCases.name: Service Personalization
useCases.description: Provides AI agents with accurate, master record information to improve the quality of customer interactions.

useCases.name: Identity Verification
useCases.description: Validates customer identities against the master records in MDM SaaS during high-value transactions or account updates.

idmcOauthCustomerId.description: Authenticate with Informatica OAuth2 authorization server using the client credentials flow.
